statement: Lambda lists NVIDIA B200 SXM6 GPU-cloud rental at $6.69/hr per GPU (8x configuration), the flagship Blackwell rate.
why: Provides a current per-GPU market rental level for flagship Blackwell B200 capacity, a reference point for $/GPU-hr economics; no baseline in the document so it is a static level.

impact.mechanism: Rental price level sets the cost baseline for renting B200 compute; a display overlay, not a demand/supply mover.

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: value 3.29 -> 6.69 (tol 1%); sources: Lambda (lambda.ai), Runpod
